items.final_wording: Covers itch, dry skin, erythema, vesicles, crusting, scaling, excoriation, lichenification, fissuring, age-linked distribution, atopy, sleep, and quality-of-life impact.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Atopic Dermatitis
source.population: Children and adults with atopic dermatitis complaints.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth atopic-dermatitis documentation; partial for every eczema or contact-dermatitis subtype.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Covers itch, dry skin, erythema, vesicles, crusting, scaling, excoriation, lichenification, fissuring, age-linked distribution, atopy, sleep, and quality-of-life impact.

items.rationale: Supports child itch, morphology, distribution, atopy, sleep and quality-of-life impact for child eczema follow-up; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Lists non-blanching rash, rapidly worsening painful eczema, fever or lethargy, respiratory distress, clustered blisters, punched-out erosions, recurrent infection, pregnancy, and psychosocial concerns.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Atopic Dermatitis
source.population: Children and adults with atopic dermatitis complaints.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth atopic-dermatitis documentation; partial for every eczema or contact-dermatitis subtype.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists non-blanching rash, rapidly worsening painful eczema, fever or lethargy, respiratory distress, clustered blisters, punched-out erosions, recurrent infection, pregnancy, and psychosocial concerns.

items.rationale: Supports rapidly worsening, infection, systemic and psychosocial warning context for child eczema follow-up; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Covers clinician-led trigger reduction, skin-barrier care, education, and pharmacological choices; no medicine dose is mapped.
